one_line_positioning: Fashion Merchandiser who built a ₹3.5L category from scratch and improved margins from 22% to 35%
narrative_angle: Entrepreneurial fashion merchandiser with P&L ownership mindset, experienced in building categories and driving profitability in womenswear
lead_strengths: Advanced data analysis and sell-through optimization
proof_points_to_emphasize: Built fashion category from near zero, generating ₹3.5L revenue in two months
Expanded assortment from 5 to 25+ subcategories by onboarding 12+ vendors
Improved product margins from 22% to 35% through supplier negotiations
Launched 3+ new sub-categories, boosting category sales by 15% in Q1
Managed PO/PI coordination across 20+ suppliers, achieving 95% on-time delivery
Analyzed weekly sales for 200+ SKUs, improving sell-through by 15%
things_to_downplay: Basic SAP/ERP proficiency; focus on willingness to upskill
Explicit OTB management experience; reshape as inventory planning via sell-through analysis
Total years of experience slightly below threshold; compensate with high-impact outcomes
Limited omnichannel tenure; highlight adaptability across online and COCO channels
tone_guidance: Direct, results-oriented, entrepreneurial, with focus on quantitative outcomes and business growth
recruiter_first_impression_target: A merchandiser who thinks like a business owner, capable of building categories from scratch and driving profitability
reasoning: Strong match on core merchandising skills and hidden expectations (P&L ownership, data-driven, vendor management). Gap in explicit OTB management and slightly low experience; compensated by exceptional category building and margin improvement evidence. Good culture fit for data-driven, trend-focused, collaborative environment.
